description: Customer reports a minor shipping delay on an order they received and are keeping - no refund demanded. The fitting gesture is a small goodwill discount on their next order (issue_discount), not a refund. The agent must not reach for create_refund over a minor delay, and must not cancel or escalate. Advisory: which goodwill gesture to offer is model judgment; the gated property is that a minor delay does not trigger a refund.

messages.contentText: Just so you know, my order #3030 showed up about four days later than the date you gave me. It arrived fine and I'm keeping it, just a bit frustrating.

simulateToolResults.result: Created a single-use 10% discount code THANKS10-ABCDEF. Tell the customer this code so they can use it at checkout on their next order.
Reply sent to customer via email.

instruction: Reply to the customer about the late delivery.
